---
title: "国立感染研の最新週報の処理"
output: html_document
date: "2025-4-16"
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)
library(lubridate)
library(jsonlite)
```


```{r, eval=FALSE}

pref_lookup <- tibble::tribble(
  ~pref, ~pref_en,
  "全国", "Nationwide",
  "北海道", "Hokkaido",
  "青森県", "Aomori",
  "岩手県", "Iwate",
  "宮城県", "Miyagi",
  "秋田県", "Akita",
  "山形県", "Yamagata",
  "福島県", "Fukushima",
  "茨城県", "Ibaraki",
  "栃木県", "Tochigi",
  "群馬県", "Gunma",
  "埼玉県", "Saitama",
  "千葉県", "Chiba",
  "東京都", "Tokyo",
  "神奈川県", "Kanagawa",
  "新潟県", "Niigata",
  "富山県", "Toyama",
  "石川県", "Ishikawa",
  "福井県", "Fukui",
  "山梨県", "Yamanashi",
  "長野県", "Nagano",
  "岐阜県", "Gifu",
  "静岡県", "Shizuoka",
  "愛知県", "Aichi",
  "三重県", "Mie",
  "滋賀県", "Shiga",
  "京都府", "Kyoto",
  "大阪府", "Osaka",
  "兵庫県", "Hyogo",
  "奈良県", "Nara",
  "和歌山県", "Wakayama",
  "鳥取県", "Tottori",
  "島根県", "Shimane",
  "岡山県", "Okayama",
  "広島県", "Hiroshima",
  "山口県", "Yamaguchi",
  "徳島県", "Tokushima",
  "香川県", "Kagawa",
  "愛媛県", "Ehime",
  "高知県", "Kochi",
  "福岡県", "Fukuoka",
  "佐賀県", "Saga",
  "長崎県", "Nagasaki",
  "熊本県", "Kumamoto",
  "大分県", "Oita",
  "宮崎県", "Miyazaki",
  "鹿児島県", "Kagoshima",
  "沖縄県", "Okinawa"
)

disease_lookup <- tibble::tribble(
  ~category, ~category_en,
  "インフルエンザ", "Flu",
  "ＲＳウイルス感染症", "RSV",
  "咽頭結膜熱", "Adenovirus infection",
  "Ａ群溶血性レンサ球菌咽頭炎", "Strep throat",
  "感染性胃腸炎", "Gastroenteritis",
  "水痘", "Chickenpox",
  "手足口病", "Hand-foot-mouth disease",
  "伝染性紅斑", "Fifth disease",
  "突発性発しん", "Roseola",
  "ヘルパンギーナ", "Herpangina",
  "流行性耳下腺炎", "Mumps",
  "急性出血性結膜炎", "Hemorrhagic conjunctivitis",
  "流行性角結膜炎", "Viral conjunctivitis",
  "細菌性髄膜炎", "Bacterial meningitis",
  "無菌性髄膜炎", "Viral meningitis",
  "マイコプラズマ肺炎", "Mycoplasma pneumonia",
  "クラミジア肺炎", "Chlamydia pneumonia",
  "感染性胃腸炎（ロタウイルス）", "Rotavirus",
  "百日咳", "Whooping cough",
  "COVID-19", "COVID-19"
)

# 元データの感染症名を表示用に変換（ダウンロード後に適用）
category_to_display <- function(x) {
  dplyr::recode(x,
    "COVID-19" = "新型コロナウイルス",
    "ＲＳウイルス感染症" = "RSウイルス",
    "Ａ群溶血性レンサ球菌咽頭炎" = "A群溶血性レンサ球菌咽頭炎",
    .default = x
  )
}

cleaned_diseases <- read_csv("merged_data/merged_data.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(category = category_to_display(category))

# cp932のCSVをUTF-8の一時ファイルに変換してからread_csvに渡すヘルパー
# （Linux環境ではvroom/readrのlocale指定だけではcp932を正しく扱えないことがあるため、
#   OSのiconvコマンドで一時ファイルに変換するのが最も確実）
read_cp932_csv <- function(file_path, ...) {
  tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".csv")
  on.exit(unlink(tmp), add = TRUE)
  system2("iconv", c("-f", "CP932", "-t", "UTF-8", file_path), stdout = tmp)
  read_csv(tmp, ...)
}

# CSVファイルを処理する関数
process_csv <- function(file_path) {
  # 2行目1列目のテキストを読み込む
  week_text <- read_cp932_csv(
    file_path,
    col_names = FALSE,
    skip = 1,
    n_max = 1
  ) %>%
    pull(1)

  # デバッグ情報を表示
  cat("Processing file:", file_path, "Week text:", week_text, "\n")

  # CSVファイルをすべて読み込み
  data <- read_cp932_csv(file_path, col_names = FALSE)

  # 3行目の奇数列（3列目以降）のNAを左隣の値で埋める
  data[3, ] <- data[3, ] %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(across(
      .cols = everything(),
      .fns = ~ {
        col_index <- which(names(data) == cur_column()) # 現在の列インデックスを取得
        if (col_index > 2 && col_index %% 2 == 1) { # 3列目以降かつ奇数列が対象
          ifelse(
            is.na(.), # NAか判定
            data[3, col_index - 1][[1]], # 左隣の値をコピー
            .
          )
        } else {
          . # 対象外の列はそのまま
        }
      }
    ))

  # 2列目以降の列名を作成（3行目と4行目を連結）
  new_col_names <- names(data) %>%
    map_chr(~ {
      col_index <- which(names(data) == .x) # 現在の列インデックスを取得
      if (col_index > 1) { # 2列目以降のみ処理
        paste0(data[3, col_index][[1]], "_", data[4, col_index][[1]])
      } else {
        .x # 1列目はそのまま
      }
    })

  # 列名を変更
  colnames(data) <- make.unique(new_col_names)

  # データの整形
  data <- data %>%
    slice(-1, -2, -3, -4) %>%  # 1～4行目を削除
    mutate(week = week_text) %>% # 新しい列として week を追加
    rename(pref = X1) %>% # 1列目を pref にリネーム
    pivot_longer(
      cols = -c(week, pref),
      names_to = "category",
      values_to = "value"
    )

  return(data)
}



# — year_week.csv 読み込み —
year_week <- read_csv("year_week.csv") %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))

# — 今日と5日前 —
today           <- Sys.Date()
five_days_before <- today - days(5)

# — 5日前以前の最新2週取得（新規ダウンロード対象） —
distinct_weeks <- year_week %>%
  filter(date <= five_days_before) %>%
  arrange(date) %>%
  tail(2) %>%
  pull(year_week)

# — ディレクトリ準備 —
data_dir <- "data"
log_dir  <- "logs"
if (!dir.exists(data_dir)) dir.create(data_dir)
if (!dir.exists(log_dir))  dir.create(log_dir)

# ── ディスク上の未処理テイテンファイルをバックフィル ──────────────────
# merged_data に含まれていない週のファイルをすべて処理して補完する。
# initial_processing.Rmd が失敗しても daily_task がカバーできるようにする。
{
  existing_end_dates <- cleaned_diseases %>%
    filter(!is.na(date)) %>% pull(date) %>% as.Date() %>% unique()

  disk_teiten <- list.files(data_dir, pattern = "-teiten\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
  backfill_list <- list()

  for (tfile in disk_teiten) {
    wk <- basename(tfile) %>% str_remove("-teiten\\.csv$")
    wk_end_date <- year_week %>% filter(year_week == wk) %>% pull(date)
    if (length(wk_end_date) == 0) next
    if (wk_end_date %in% existing_end_dates) next

    message("バックフィル処理: ", wk)
    df_bf <- tryCatch({
      process_csv(tfile) %>%
        mutate(year = as.double(str_sub(week, 1, 4))) %>%
        mutate(pref = ifelse(pref == "総数", "全国", pref)) %>%
        filter(!is.na(pref)) %>%
        bind_cols(
          str_match(.$week,
            "(\\d{4})年\\d+週\\((\\d{1,2})月(\\d{1,2})日～(\\d{1,2})月(\\d{1,2})日\\)"
          ) %>%
            as_tibble(.name_repair = "minimal") %>%
            setNames(c("full", "year_str", "m1", "d1", "m2", "d2"))
        ) %>%
        mutate(across(c(m1, d1, m2, d2), ~ as.integer(.))) %>%
        mutate(
          date = as.Date(sprintf("%s-%02d-%02d",
                                 year_str, as.integer(m2), as.integer(d2))),
          week_label_clean = ifelse(
            is.na(year_str), NA_character_,
            sprintf("%d月%d日～%d月%d日（%s年）",
                    as.integer(m1), as.integer(d1),
                    as.integer(m2), as.integer(d2), year_str)
          )
        ) %>%
        dplyr::select(-full, -year_str, -m1, -d1, -m2, -d2) %>%
        filter(str_detect(category, "定当")) %>%
        mutate(category = str_remove(category, "_定当")) %>%
        dplyr::select(date, pref, category, value, year, week_label_clean) %>%
        mutate(value = as.double(value)) %>%
        filter(!(category == "ＲＳウイルス感染症" & is.na(value))) %>%
        mutate(value = ifelse(is.na(value), 0, value)) %>%
        mutate(category = category_to_display(category))
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("バックフィル失敗: ", wk, " — ", conditionMessage(e)); NULL
    })

    if (!is.null(df_bf) && nrow(df_bf) > 0) {
      message("  追加: ", nrow(df_bf), " 行 (date=",
              paste(unique(as.character(df_bf$date)), collapse=","), ")")
      backfill_list[[wk]] <- df_bf
      existing_end_dates <- c(existing_end_dates, unique(as.Date(df_bf$date)))
    }
  }

  if (length(backfill_list) > 0) {
    cleaned_diseases <- bind_rows(cleaned_diseases, bind_rows(backfill_list)) %>%
      distinct()
    cleaned_diseases %>% write_excel_csv("merged_data/merged_data.csv")
    message("バックフィル完了: ", length(backfill_list), " 週分を統合しました")
  } else {
    message("バックフィル: 未処理ファイルなし")
  }
}

# — 累積ログファイル設定 —
log_file <- file.path(log_dir, "log.csv")

# — 既存ログ読み込みまたは空の tibble —
if (file.exists(log_file)) {
  existing_logs <- read_csv(
    log_file,
    col_types = cols(
      timestamp  = col_character(),
      week_label = col_character(),
      action     = col_character(),
      rows       = col_integer()
    )
  )
} else {
  existing_logs <- tibble(
    timestamp  = character(),
    week_label = character(),
    action     = character(),
    rows       = integer()
  )
}

# — 初期化 —
log_entries <- list()
data_list   <- list()

for (week_label in distinct_weeks) {
  ts        <- Sys.time()
  parts     <- str_split(week_label, "-")[[1]]
  url       <- sprintf(
    "https://id-info.jihs.go.jp/surveillance/idwr/jp/rapid/%s/%s/%s-teiten.csv",
    parts[1], parts[2], week_label
  )
  local_file <- file.path(data_dir, sprintf("%s-teiten.csv", week_label))

  if (!file.exists(local_file)) {
    success <- tryCatch(
      { download.file(url, destfile = local_file, mode = "wb"); TRUE },
      error = function(e) FALSE
    )
    if (success && file.exists(local_file)) {
      df <- tryCatch({
        process_csv(local_file) %>%
          mutate(year = as.double(str_sub(week, 1, 4))) %>%
          mutate(pref = ifelse(pref == "総数", "全国", pref)) %>%
          filter(!is.na(pref)) %>%
          bind_cols(
            str_match(.$week,
              "(\\d{4})年\\d+週\\((\\d{1,2})月(\\d{1,2})日～(\\d{1,2})月(\\d{1,2})日\\)"
            ) %>%
              as_tibble(.name_repair = "minimal") %>%
              setNames(c("full", "year_str", "m1", "d1", "m2", "d2"))
          ) %>%
          mutate(across(c(m1, d1, m2, d2), ~ as.integer(.))) %>%
          mutate(
            date = as.Date(sprintf("%s-%02d-%02d", year_str, as.integer(m2), as.integer(d2))),
            week_label_clean = ifelse(
              is.na(year_str), NA_character_,
              sprintf("%d月%d日～%d月%d日（%s年）",
                      as.integer(m1), as.integer(d1),
                      as.integer(m2), as.integer(d2), year_str)
            )
          ) %>%
          dplyr::select(-full, -year_str, -m1, -d1, -m2, -d2) %>%
          filter(str_detect(category, "定当")) %>%
          mutate(category = str_remove(category, "_定当")) %>%
          dplyr::select(date, pref, category, value, year, week_label_clean) %>%
          mutate(value = as.double(value)) %>%
          filter(!(category == "ＲＳウイルス感染症" & is.na(value))) %>%
          mutate(value = ifelse(is.na(value), 0, value))
      }, error = function(e) {
        message("週データの処理に失敗しました (", week_label, "): ", conditionMessage(e))
        NULL
      })
      if (!is.null(df)) {
        log_entry <- tibble(timestamp=as.character(ts), week_label=week_label, action="downloaded", rows=nrow(df))
        data_list[[week_label]] <- df
      } else {
        log_entry <- tibble(timestamp=as.character(ts), week_label=week_label, action="parse_error", rows=NA_integer_)
      }
    } else {
      log_entry <- tibble(timestamp=as.character(ts), week_label=week_label, action="not_found", rows=NA_integer_)
    }
  } else {
    log_entry <- tibble(timestamp=as.character(ts), week_label=week_label, action="skipped", rows=NA_integer_)
  }
  log_entries <- append(log_entries, list(log_entry))
  Sys.sleep(5)
}

# — ログ結合＆出力 —
new_logs <- bind_rows(log_entries)
all_logs <- bind_rows(existing_logs, new_logs) %>%
  distinct()

write_csv(all_logs, log_file)

# 取得試行日時をフロント用に出力（ログの最終タイムスタンプ）
if (nrow(all_logs) > 0) {
  last_attempt <- max(as.POSIXct(all_logs$timestamp), na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!dir.exists("docs/results")) dir.create("docs/results", recursive = TRUE)
  writeLines(format(last_attempt, "%Y-%m-%d"), "docs/results/last_fetch.txt")
}

# 新規データがあれば統合
if (length(data_list) > 0) {
  latest_data <- bind_rows(data_list) %>% distinct()
  cleaned_diseases <- cleaned_diseases %>%
    bind_rows(latest_data) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    mutate(category = category_to_display(category))
  cleaned_diseases %>% write_excel_csv("merged_data/merged_data.csv")
  message("新規データを統合し merged_data を更新しました。")
} else {
  message("新規データがありませんでした。")
}

# グラフ用CSVは常に変換後の名前で出力（新規の有無にかかわらず）
cleaned_diseases %>%
  filter(pref == "全国")  %>% write_excel_csv("docs/results/data-全国.csv")
cleaned_diseases %>%
  filter(pref == "東京都") %>% write_excel_csv("docs/results/data-東京都.csv")
cleaned_diseases %>%
  filter(pref == "大阪府") %>% write_excel_csv("docs/results/data-大阪府.csv")
# 「その他」都道府県は 都道府県×感染症 の組み合わせで1ファイルずつ出力。
# JS がチャートを描く直前に必要な1疾患分だけロードできるようにするため。
# ファイル名は JS の categoryToDisplay() と同じ表示名を使う（名前不一致による404を防ぐ）。
category_to_display <- function(cat) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    cat == "COVID-19"                  ~ "新型コロナウイルス",
    cat == "ＲＳウイルス感染症"         ~ "RSウイルス",
    cat == "Ａ群溶血性レンサ球菌咽頭炎" ~ "A群溶血性レンサ球菌咽頭炎",
    TRUE ~ cat
  )
}
dir.create("docs/results/pref", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
other_prefs <- cleaned_diseases %>%
  filter(!pref %in% c("全国", "東京都", "大阪府")) %>%
  distinct(pref) %>%
  pull(pref)
for (p in other_prefs) {
  cats_p <- cleaned_diseases %>% filter(pref == p) %>% distinct(category) %>% pull(category)
  for (cat in cats_p) {
    file_cat <- category_to_display(cat)
    cleaned_diseases %>%
      filter(pref == p, category == cat) %>%
      write_excel_csv(paste0("docs/results/pref/data-", p, "-", file_cat, ".csv"))
  }
}

# ---- ランキング用: 平年比・警報基準比（毎回実行・cleaned_diseases で算出） ----
# 出典: docs/DASHBOARD_SPEC.md, data/alert_thresholds.csv
yw <- cleaned_diseases %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  distinct(date) %>%
  mutate(
    yr = lubridate::year(date),
    wk = lubridate::isoweek(date),
    year_week = sprintf("%04d-%02d", yr, wk)
  ) %>%
  select(date, year_week, yr, wk)

d <- cleaned_diseases %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  left_join(yw, by = "date") %>%
  group_by(pref, category) %>%
  arrange(date) %>%
  mutate(
    ma4 = if_else(
      row_number() >= 4,
      (value + lag(value, 1) + lag(value, 2) + lag(value, 3)) / 4,
      NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(ma4))

by_week <- d %>%
  group_by(pref, category, year_week) %>%
  summarise(
    ma4 = last(ma4),
    weekly_value = last(value),
    yr = last(yr),
    wk = last(wk),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

latest_yr_wk <- by_week %>% pull(year_week) %>% max()
latest_yr <- as.integer(substr(latest_yr_wk, 1, 4))
latest_wk <- substr(latest_yr_wk, 6, 7)
past_3_weeks <- sprintf("%04d-%s", (latest_yr - 1):(latest_yr - 3), latest_wk)

# 現在値＝直近週の数値（移動平均ではない）。同週に複数日ある場合は最も新しい日の値を使う
current_ma4 <- d %>%
  filter(year_week == latest_yr_wk) %>%
  group_by(pref, category) %>%
  slice_max(date, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(pref, category, current_ma4 = value)

reference_date <- d %>% filter(year_week == latest_yr_wk) %>% pull(date) %>% max(na.rm = TRUE)

baseline_ma4 <- by_week %>%
  filter(year_week %in% past_3_weeks) %>%
  group_by(pref, category) %>%
  summarise(baseline_ma4 = mean(ma4), .groups = "drop")

alert <- read_csv("data/alert_thresholds.csv", col_types = "cdddc")

ranking <- current_ma4 %>%
  inner_join(baseline_ma4, by = c("pref", "category")) %>%
  filter(baseline_ma4 > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    ratio_heinen = round(current_ma4 / baseline_ma4, 2),
    year_week = latest_yr_wk,
    reference_date = as.character(reference_date)
  ) %>%
  left_join(alert %>% select(category, alert_start), by = "category") %>%
  mutate(
    ratio_alert = if_else(
      !is.na(alert_start) & alert_start > 0,
      round(current_ma4 / alert_start, 2),
      NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  select(category, pref, year_week, reference_date, current_ma4, baseline_ma4, ratio_heinen, alert_start, ratio_alert)

# ranking.csv は news_base 計算後に ratio_wow を付与してから書き出す（下記）

# ---- トップ要点カード用: 事前計算済みJSON（全国 + 上位3都道府県） ----
ranking_valid <- ranking %>%
  filter(!is.na(ratio_alert))

if (nrow(ranking_valid) > 0) {
  compare_cols <- c("ratio_alert", "ratio_heinen", "current_ma4")

  nationwide_anchor <- ranking_valid %>%
    filter(pref == "全国")
  if (nrow(nationwide_anchor) == 0) nationwide_anchor <- ranking_valid

  target_row <- nationwide_anchor %>%
    arrange(desc(ratio_alert), desc(ratio_heinen), desc(current_ma4)) %>%
    slice(1)
  target_category <- target_row$category[[1]]

  top_pref_rows <- ranking_valid %>%
    filter(category == target_category, pref != "全国") %>%
    arrange(desc(ratio_alert), desc(ratio_heinen), desc(current_ma4)) %>%
    slice_head(n = 3)

  nationwide_row <- ranking %>%
    filter(category == target_category, pref == "全国") %>%
    slice_head(n = 1)
  if (nrow(nationwide_row) == 0) nationwide_row <- target_row %>% mutate(pref = "全国")

  # Sparkline values (latest 52 points) for nationwide and top3 prefs only.
  spark_targets <- c("全国", top_pref_rows$pref)
  spark_map <- cleaned_diseases %>%
    mutate(date = as.Date(date), value = as.numeric(value)) %>%
    filter(category == target_category, pref %in% spark_targets, !is.na(value)) %>%
    arrange(date) %>%
    group_by(pref) %>%
    slice_tail(n = 52) %>%
    summarise(series52 = list(as.numeric(value)), .groups = "drop")

  get_series52 <- function(pref_name) {
    row <- spark_map %>% filter(pref == pref_name)
    if (nrow(row) == 0) return(list())
    unname(as.list(row$series52[[1]]))
  }

  nationwide_obj <- list(
    category = target_category,
    pref = "全国",
    rankLabel = "全国",
    current_ma4 = as.numeric(nationwide_row$current_ma4[[1]]),
    ratio_alert = as.numeric(nationwide_row$ratio_alert[[1]]),
    series52 = get_series52("全国")
  )

  top_pref_objs <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(top_pref_rows)), function(i) {
    row <- top_pref_rows[i, ]
    list(
      category = target_category,
      pref = as.character(row$pref[[1]]),
      rankLabel = paste0(i, "."),
      current_ma4 = as.numeric(row$current_ma4[[1]]),
      ratio_alert = as.numeric(row$ratio_alert[[1]]),
      series52 = get_series52(as.character(row$pref[[1]]))
    )
  })

  top_payload <- list(
    targetCategory = target_category,
    generatedAt = as.character(Sys.time()),
    nationwideRow = nationwide_obj,
    topPrefRows = top_pref_objs
  )

  if (!dir.exists("docs/results")) dir.create("docs/results", recursive = TRUE)
  writeLines(toJSON(top_payload, auto_unbox = TRUE, pretty = TRUE, na = "null"), "docs/results/top_highlights.json")
  message("トップ要点JSON出力: docs/results/top_highlights.json")
}

# ---- ニュース自動生成: news_digest.json / weekly_report.md ----
safe_num <- function(x, digits = 4) {
  ifelse(is.finite(x), round(as.numeric(x), digits), NA_real_)
}
fmt_num <- function(x, digits = 2) {
  ifelse(is.finite(x), format(round(x, digits), nsmall = digits), "—")
}

MIN_CURRENT_MA4 <- 0.1
MIN_AVG_FOR_GROWTH <- 0.1
PERSISTENCE_WINDOW <- 4L

# importance score weights
W_ANOMALY <- 0.6
W_ALERT <- 0.8
W_LEVEL <- 0.4
W_PERSISTENCE <- 0.5
W_GROWTH <- 0.3
BONUS_ANOMALY <- 1.0
BONUS_ALERT <- 2.0
BONUS_PERSIST <- 3.0
BONUS_RISING <- 0.5

major_categories <- c(
  "インフルエンザ",
  "RSウイルス",
  "感染性胃腸炎",
  "手足口病",
  "A群溶血性レンサ球菌咽頭炎",
  "咽頭結膜熱",
  "新型コロナウイルス"
)

PREF_TO_BLOCK <- c(
  "北海道" = "北海道",
  "青森県" = "東北", "岩手県" = "東北", "宮城県" = "東北", "秋田県" = "東北", "山形県" = "東北", "福島県" = "東北",
  "茨城県" = "関東", "栃木県" = "関東", "群馬県" = "関東", "埼玉県" = "関東", "千葉県" = "関東", "東京都" = "関東", "神奈川県" = "関東",
  "新潟県" = "中部", "富山県" = "中部", "石川県" = "中部", "福井県" = "中部", "山梨県" = "中部", "長野県" = "中部", "岐阜県" = "中部", "静岡県" = "中部", "愛知県" = "中部",
  "三重県" = "近畿", "滋賀県" = "近畿", "京都府" = "近畿", "大阪府" = "近畿", "兵庫県" = "近畿", "奈良県" = "近畿", "和歌山県" = "近畿",
  "鳥取県" = "中国", "島根県" = "中国", "岡山県" = "中国", "広島県" = "中国", "山口県" = "中国",
  "徳島県" = "四国", "香川県" = "四国", "愛媛県" = "四国", "高知県" = "四国",
  "福岡県" = "九州", "佐賀県" = "九州", "長崎県" = "九州", "熊本県" = "九州", "大分県" = "九州", "宮崎県" = "九州", "鹿児島県" = "九州", "沖縄県" = "九州"
)

is_major_category <- function(cat) {
  !is.na(cat) & cat %in% major_categories
}

prefToBlock <- function(pref) {
  out <- unname(PREF_TO_BLOCK[pref])
  ifelse(is.na(out), NA_character_, out)
}

classifySpreadType <- function(blocks) {
  n <- length(unique(blocks[!is.na(blocks)]))
  if (n <= 1) return("局所")
  if (n <= 3) return("地域拡散")
  "全国拡散"
}

computeBlockCounts <- function(top_pref_df, rising_df, alert_df) {
  bind_rows(
    top_pref_df %>% select(category, pref),
    rising_df %>% select(category, pref),
    alert_df %>% select(category, pref)
  ) %>%
    mutate(block = prefToBlock(pref)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(block)) %>%
    group_by(category, block) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")
}

buildGeoContext <- function(digest) {
  top_news <- digest$top_news
  top_pref_df <- digest$top_pref_df
  rising_df <- digest$rising_df
  alert_df <- digest$alert_df
  block_counts <- computeBlockCounts(top_pref_df, rising_df, alert_df)
  if (nrow(top_news) == 0) {
    return(list(
      spread_type = "局所",
      affected_blocks = character(0),
      sentence = "地域分布は限定的です。"
    ))
  }
  target_cat <- as.character(top_news$category[[1]])
  target_blocks <- block_counts %>%
    filter(category == target_cat) %>%
    arrange(desc(n), block)
  affected_blocks <- target_blocks$block
  spread_type <- classifySpreadType(affected_blocks)
  flags <- unlist(top_news$flags[[1]])
  block_text <- if (length(affected_blocks) > 0) paste(affected_blocks, collapse = "・") else "限定的な地域"
  sentence <- if ("rising" %in% flags) {
    sprintf("%sの増加は%sを中心にみられます。", target_cat, block_text)
  } else if ("alert" %in% flags) {
    sprintf("%sの警報超えは%sを中心にみられます。", target_cat, block_text)
  } else {
    sprintf("%sの発生は%sを中心にみられます。", target_cat, block_text)
  }
  list(
    spread_type = spread_type,
    affected_blocks = affected_blocks,
    sentence = sentence
  )
}

computeSeasonalBaseline <- function(rows) {
  rows %>%
    mutate(
      seasonal_mean = pmap_dbl(
        list(weekly_value_series, year_series, week_series),
        function(weekly_value_series, year_series, week_series) {
          if (length(weekly_value_series) <= 1 || length(year_series) != length(weekly_value_series) || length(week_series) != length(weekly_value_series)) return(NA_real_)
          current_year <- tail(year_series, 1)
          current_week <- tail(week_series, 1)
          max_week <- ifelse(any(week_series == 53, na.rm = TRUE), 53, 52)
          week_distance <- pmin(abs(week_series - current_week), max_week - abs(week_series - current_week))
          hist_idx <- year_series < current_year & week_distance <= 2 & is.finite(weekly_value_series)
          hist_values <- weekly_value_series[hist_idx]
          if (length(hist_values) == 0) return(NA_real_)
          m <- mean(hist_values, na.rm = TRUE)
          ifelse(is.finite(m), m, NA_real_)
        }
      ),
      seasonal_std = pmap_dbl(
        list(weekly_value_series, year_series, week_series),
        function(weekly_value_series, year_series, week_series) {
          if (length(weekly_value_series) <= 2 || length(year_series) != length(weekly_value_series) || length(week_series) != length(weekly_value_series)) return(NA_real_)
          current_year <- tail(year_series, 1)
          current_week <- tail(week_series, 1)
          max_week <- ifelse(any(week_series == 53, na.rm = TRUE), 53, 52)
          week_distance <- pmin(abs(week_series - current_week), max_week - abs(week_series - current_week))
          hist_idx <- year_series < current_year & week_distance <= 2 & is.finite(weekly_value_series)
          hist_values <- weekly_value_series[hist_idx]
          if (length(hist_values) <= 1) return(NA_real_)
          sdv <- sd(hist_values, na.rm = TRUE)
          ifelse(is.finite(sdv) && sdv > 0, sdv, NA_real_)
        }
      )
    )
}

computeSeasonalZscore <- function(row) {
  cv <- row$current_value
  sm <- row$seasonal_mean
  ss <- row$seasonal_std
  if (!is.finite(cv) || !is.finite(sm) || !is.finite(ss) || ss <= 0) return(NA_real_)
  z <- (cv - sm) / ss
  ifelse(is.finite(z), z, NA_real_)
}

computeImportanceScore <- function(row) {
  sz <- ifelse(is.finite(row$seasonal_zscore), as.numeric(row$seasonal_zscore), 0)
  ra <- ifelse(is.finite(row$ratio_alert), as.numeric(row$ratio_alert), 0)
  cm <- ifelse(is.finite(row$current_ma4), as.numeric(row$current_ma4), 0)
  pr <- ifelse(is.finite(row$persistenceRate), as.numeric(row$persistenceRate), 0)
  gr <- ifelse(is.finite(row$growth1Rate), as.numeric(row$growth1Rate), 0)
  wo <- ifelse(is.finite(row$weeksOverAlert), as.numeric(row$weeksOverAlert), 0)

  anomaly_component <- max(sz, 0) * W_ANOMALY
  alert_component <- max(ra, 0) * W_ALERT
  level_component <- log(1 + max(cm, 0)) * W_LEVEL
  persistence_component <- max(pr, 0) * W_PERSISTENCE
  growth_component <- max(gr, 0) * 0.15

  score <- anomaly_component + alert_component + level_component + persistence_component + growth_component
  if (sz >= 2.5) score <- score + BONUS_ANOMALY
  if (ra >= 1) score <- score + 1.5
  if (wo >= 2) score <- score + BONUS_PERSIST
  if (gr >= 0.2) score <- score + BONUS_RISING
  ifelse(is.finite(score), as.numeric(score), 0)
}

attachImportanceScore <- function(df) {
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    df$importance_score <- numeric(0)
    return(df)
  }
  getcol <- function(nm, default = NA_real_) {
    if (nm %in% names(df)) return(df[[nm]])
    rep(default, nrow(df))
  }
  df %>%
    mutate(
      importance_score = mapply(
        function(seasonal_zscore, ratio_alert, current_ma4, persistenceRate, growth1Rate, weeksOverAlert) {
          computeImportanceScore(list(
            seasonal_zscore = seasonal_zscore,
            ratio_alert = ratio_alert,
            current_ma4 = current_ma4,
            persistenceRate = persistenceRate,
            growth1Rate = growth1Rate,
            weeksOverAlert = weeksOverAlert
          ))
        },
        getcol("seasonal_zscore"),
        getcol("ratio_alert"),
        getcol("current_ma4"),
        getcol("persistenceRate"),
        getcol("growth1Rate"),
        getcol("weeksOverAlert")
      )
    )
}

buildNewsCandidates <- function(digest) {
  anomalies_df <- digest$anomalies_df
  rising_df <- digest$rising_df
  alert_df <- digest$alert_df

  parts <- list()
  if (nrow(anomalies_df) > 0) parts <- append(parts, list(anomalies_df %>% mutate(flag = "anomaly")))
  if (nrow(rising_df) > 0) parts <- append(parts, list(rising_df %>% mutate(flag = "rising")))
  if (nrow(alert_df) > 0) parts <- append(parts, list(alert_df %>% mutate(flag = "alert")))
  if (length(parts) == 0) return(tibble())

  bind_rows(parts) %>%
    group_by(category, pref) %>%
    summarise(
      importance_score = max(importance_score, na.rm = TRUE),
      flags = list(sort(unique(flag))),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(importance_score))
}

pickTopNews <- function(candidates) {
  if (nrow(candidates) == 0) return(candidates)
  candidates %>% slice_head(n = 1)
}

buildTopNewsSection <- function(digest) {
  top_news <- digest$top_news
  candidates <- digest$news_candidates
  if (nrow(top_news) == 0) {
    return(c("## 今週の最大ニュース", "- 該当データなし"))
  }
  top_line <- sprintf(
    "- %s（%s）: importance_score %s / %s",
    as.character(top_news$category[[1]]),
    as.character(top_news$pref[[1]]),
    fmt_num(top_news$importance_score[[1]], 2),
    paste(unlist(top_news$flags[[1]]), collapse = ", ")
  )
  cand_lines <- if (nrow(candidates) > 0) {
    candidates %>%
      slice_head(n = 3) %>%
      mutate(
        line = sprintf(
          "- %s（%s）: importance_score %s / %s",
          category, pref, fmt_num(importance_score, 2), vapply(flags, function(x) paste(unlist(x), collapse = ", "), character(1))
        )
      ) %>%
      pull(line)
  } else {
    "- 該当データなし"
  }
  c(
    "## 今週の最大ニュース",
    top_line,
    "",
    "## 注目候補",
    cand_lines
  )
}

detectAnomalies <- function(rows) {
  rows %>%
    mutate(
      anomaly_z = mapply(
        function(current_value, seasonal_mean, seasonal_std) {
          computeSeasonalZscore(list(
            current_value = current_value,
            seasonal_mean = seasonal_mean,
            seasonal_std = seasonal_std
          ))
        },
        current_value, seasonal_mean, seasonal_std
      ),
      anomaly_ratio = if_else(
        is.finite(seasonal_mean) & seasonal_mean >= MIN_CURRENT_MA4,
        current_value / seasonal_mean,
        NA_real_
      ),
      anomaly_diff = if_else(
        is.finite(seasonal_mean),
        current_value - seasonal_mean,
        NA_real_
      )
    ) %>%
    filter(pref == "全国") %>%
    filter(is.finite(current_value), current_value >= MIN_CURRENT_MA4) %>%
    filter(is.finite(seasonal_mean), seasonal_mean >= MIN_CURRENT_MA4) %>%
    filter(is.finite(anomaly_z)) %>%
    arrange(desc(anomaly_z), desc(anomaly_ratio), desc(anomaly_diff), desc(current_value)) %>%
    slice_head(n = 3) %>%
    mutate(seasonal_zscore = anomaly_z, seasonal_ratio = anomaly_ratio)
}

isMeaningfulSeries <- function(row) {
  current_ok <- is.finite(row$current_value) && row$current_value >= MIN_CURRENT_MA4
  prev_ok <- is.finite(row$previous_value) && row$previous_value >= MIN_CURRENT_MA4
  current_ok && prev_ok
}

pick_top_major_first <- function(df, sort_exprs, n = 3) {
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(df)
  major_df <- df %>% filter(is_major)
  non_major_df <- df %>% filter(!is_major)
  ordered_major <- major_df %>% arrange(!!!sort_exprs)
  if (nrow(ordered_major) >= n) return(slice_head(ordered_major, n = n))
  need <- n - nrow(ordered_major)
  ordered_non_major <- non_major_df %>% arrange(!!!sort_exprs) %>% slice_head(n = need)
  bind_rows(ordered_major, ordered_non_major)
}

selectLead <- function(rows) {
  nationwide <- rows %>% filter(pref == "全国")

  cand_growth <- nationwide %>%
    filter(is.finite(current_value), current_value >= MIN_CURRENT_MA4) %>%
    filter(is.finite(previous_value), previous_value >= MIN_CURRENT_MA4) %>%
    filter(is.finite(growth1Rate)) %>%
    mutate(growth_diff = current_value - previous_value) %>%
    arrange(desc(growth1Rate), desc(current_value), desc(growth_diff))

  if (nrow(cand_growth) > 0) {
    return(list(row = cand_growth %>% slice(1), reason = "D: 全国で前週比増加率最大"))
  }

  cand_anomaly <- nationwide %>%
    filter(is.finite(anomaly_z)) %>%
    arrange(desc(anomaly_z), desc(anomaly_ratio), desc(anomaly_diff), desc(current_value))
  if (nrow(cand_anomaly) > 0) {
    return(list(row = cand_anomaly %>% slice(1), reason = "A: 全国で季節逸脱度最大"))
  }

  list(row = nationwide %>% arrange(desc(current_value)) %>% slice_head(n = 1), reason = "E: 代替（全国の現在値最大）")
}

computeAlertPrefCounts <- function(rows) {
  counts <- rows %>%
    filter(pref != "全国", is.finite(ratio_alert), ratio_alert >= 1) %>%
    group_by(category) %>%
    summarise(pref_alert_count = n(), .groups = "drop")
  out <- counts$pref_alert_count
  names(out) <- counts$category
  out
}

integrateAnomalyIntoLead <- function(digest) {
  anomalies_df <- digest$anomalies_df
  rows <- digest$rows
  if (nrow(anomalies_df) == 0) return(digest)

  top_anom <- anomalies_df %>% slice(1)
  target_cat <- as.character(top_anom$category[[1]])
  nationwide_row <- rows %>%
    filter(pref == "全国", category == target_cat) %>%
    arrange(desc(ratio_alert), desc(current_ma4)) %>%
    slice_head(n = 1)

  digest$lead$category <- target_cat
  digest$lead$reason <- sprintf(
    "A: 季節パターン逸脱（%s %s, z=%s）",
    target_cat,
    as.character(top_anom$pref[[1]]),
    fmt_num(top_anom$seasonal_zscore[[1]], 2)
  )
  if (nrow(nationwide_row) > 0) {
    digest$lead$nationwide_ratio_alert <- ifelse(is.finite(nationwide_row$ratio_alert[[1]]), as.numeric(nationwide_row$ratio_alert[[1]]), NA_real_)
    digest$lead$nationwide_current_ma4 <- ifelse(is.finite(nationwide_row$current_ma4[[1]]), as.numeric(nationwide_row$current_ma4[[1]]), NA_real_)
    digest$lead_row <- nationwide_row
  } else {
    digest$lead$nationwide_ratio_alert <- NA_real_
    digest$lead$nationwide_current_ma4 <- NA_real_
    digest$lead_row <- rows %>% filter(category == target_cat) %>% arrange(desc(current_ma4)) %>% slice_head(n = 1)
  }
  digest$lead_category <- target_cat
  digest
}

selectTopPrefectures <- function(rows, lead_row, anomalies_df = NULL, prefer_anomaly_prefs = FALSE) {
  if (nrow(lead_row) == 0) return(rows %>% slice(0))
  lead_cat <- as.character(lead_row$category[[1]])
  base <- rows %>%
    filter(category == lead_cat, pref != "全国") %>%
    filter(is.finite(ratio_alert), current_ma4 >= MIN_CURRENT_MA4) %>%
    mutate(priority_high = ratio_alert > 0.5) %>%
    arrange(desc(priority_high), desc(ratio_alert), desc(current_ma4)) %>%
    slice_head(n = 3)

  if (!prefer_anomaly_prefs || is.null(anomalies_df) || nrow(anomalies_df) == 0) {
    return(base)
  }

  anomaly_prefs <- anomalies_df %>%
    filter(category == lead_cat) %>%
    arrange(desc(seasonal_zscore)) %>%
    pull(pref) %>%
    unique()

  if (length(anomaly_prefs) == 0) return(base)

  rows %>%
    filter(category == lead_cat, pref != "全国") %>%
    filter(is.finite(ratio_alert), current_ma4 >= MIN_CURRENT_MA4) %>%
    mutate(
      priority_high = ratio_alert > 0.5,
      anomaly_rank = match(pref, anomaly_prefs),
      is_anomaly_pref = !is.na(anomaly_rank)
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(is_anomaly_pref), anomaly_rank, desc(priority_high), desc(ratio_alert), desc(current_ma4)) %>%
    slice_head(n = 3)
}

selectRising <- function(rows, alert_categories = character(0)) {
  rows %>%
    filter(pref == "全国") %>%
    filter(!category %in% alert_categories) %>%
    filter(is.finite(growth1Rate), growth1Rate >= 0.3) %>%
    filter(is.finite(current_value), current_value >= 0.1) %>%
    filter(is.finite(previous_value), previous_value >= 0.05) %>%
    mutate(growth_diff = current_value - previous_value) %>%
    arrange(desc(growth1Rate), desc(current_value), desc(growth_diff)) %>%
    slice_head(n = 3)
}

formatPrefSuffix <- function(pref_names) {
  has_to  <- any(grepl("都$", pref_names))
  has_do  <- any(grepl("道$", pref_names))
  has_fu  <- any(grepl("府$", pref_names))
  has_ken <- any(grepl("県$", pref_names))
  suffix <- paste0(
    if (has_to)  "都" else "",
    if (has_do)  "道" else "",
    if (has_fu)  "府" else "",
    if (has_ken) "県" else ""
  )
  if (nchar(suffix) == 0) "地域" else suffix
}

formatPrefText <- function(all_prefs, total) {
  if (total == 0 || length(all_prefs) == 0) return("全国で")
  if (total == 1) return(sprintf("%sで", all_prefs[1]))
  if (total == 2) return(sprintf("%sと%sで", all_prefs[1], all_prefs[2]))
  suffix <- formatPrefSuffix(all_prefs)
  sprintf("%sと%sなど%d%sで", all_prefs[1], all_prefs[2], total, suffix)
}

buildAlertBullet <- function(row) {
  cat_name   <- as.character(row$category[[1]])
  ratio      <- as.numeric(row$ratio_alert[[1]])
  count      <- as.integer(row$pref_alert_count[[1]])
  all_prefs  <- unlist(row$top_prefs[[1]])
  pref_text  <- formatPrefText(all_prefs, count)
  nationwide_word <- if (is.finite(ratio) && ratio >= 1) "でも" else "では"
  sprintf("%s：%s警報基準値を超える患者数。全国平均%s基準値の%.2f倍",
          cat_name, pref_text, nationwide_word, ratio)
}

buildRisingBullet <- function(row) {
  cat_name <- as.character(row$category[[1]])
  pct      <- round(as.numeric(row$growth1Rate[[1]]) * 100)
  current  <- as.numeric(row$current_value[[1]])
  sprintf("%s：全国平均で前週比+%d%%の急増（定点あたり%.2f人）",
          cat_name, pct, current)
}

selectAlerts <- function(rows) {
  alert_prefs <- rows %>%
    filter(pref != "全国", is.finite(ratio_alert), ratio_alert > 1) %>%
    arrange(desc(ratio_alert), desc(current_ma4))

  pref_info <- alert_prefs %>%
    group_by(category) %>%
    summarise(
      pref_alert_count = n(),
      top_prefs        = list(as.character(pref)),
      .groups          = "drop"
    )

  if (nrow(pref_info) == 0) return(rows %>% slice(0))

  nationwide <- rows %>%
    filter(pref == "全国", category %in% pref_info$category, is.finite(ratio_alert))

  if (nrow(nationwide) == 0) return(nationwide)

  result <- nationwide %>%
    left_join(pref_info, by = "category")

  result$pref_alert_count[is.na(result$pref_alert_count)] <- 0L
  result$top_prefs[sapply(result$top_prefs, is.null)] <- list(character(0))

  result %>%
    mutate(
      alert_score = ratio_alert +
                    log(pref_alert_count + 1) +
                    log(pmax(coalesce(as.numeric(weeksOverAlert), 0), 0) + 1)
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(alert_score)) %>%
    slice_head(n = 3)
}

selectImproving <- function(rows) {
  base <- rows %>%
    filter(pref == "全国") %>%
    filter(is.finite(growth1Rate), growth1Rate <= -0.2) %>%
    filter(is.finite(current_value), current_value >= MIN_CURRENT_MA4) %>%
    filter(!is.finite(anomaly_z) | anomaly_z < 2)
  pick_top_major_first(base, rlang::quos(growth1Rate, desc(current_value)), n = 3)
}

as_item_list <- function(df, n = 3) {
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(list())
  out <- df %>% slice_head(n = n)
  lapply(seq_len(nrow(out)), function(i) {
    row <- out[i, ]
    list(
      category = as.character(row$category[[1]]),
      pref = as.character(row$pref[[1]]),
      current_ma4 = ifelse(is.finite(row$current_ma4[[1]]), as.numeric(row$current_ma4[[1]]), NA_real_),
      current_value = ifelse(is.finite(row$current_value[[1]]), as.numeric(row$current_value[[1]]), NA_real_),
      previous_value = ifelse(is.finite(row$previous_value[[1]]), as.numeric(row$previous_value[[1]]), NA_real_),
      ratio_alert = ifelse(is.finite(row$ratio_alert[[1]]), as.numeric(row$ratio_alert[[1]]), NA_real_),
      ratio_heinen = ifelse(is.finite(row$ratio_heinen[[1]]), as.numeric(row$ratio_heinen[[1]]), NA_real_),
      growth1Rate = ifelse(is.finite(row$growth1Rate[[1]]), as.numeric(row$growth1Rate[[1]]), NA_real_),
      weeksOverAlert = ifelse(is.finite(row$weeksOverAlert[[1]]), as.integer(row$weeksOverAlert[[1]]), NA_integer_),
      persistenceRate = ifelse(is.finite(row$persistenceRate[[1]]), as.numeric(row$persistenceRate[[1]]), NA_real_),
      persistenceWindow = ifelse(is.finite(row$persistenceWindow[[1]]), as.integer(row$persistenceWindow[[1]]), NA_integer_),
      importance_score = ifelse(is.finite(row$importance_score[[1]]), as.numeric(row$importance_score[[1]]), NA_real_)
    )
  })
}

as_anomaly_list <- function(df, n = 3) {
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(list())
  out <- df %>% slice_head(n = n)
  lapply(seq_len(nrow(out)), function(i) {
    row <- out[i, ]
    list(
      category = as.character(row$category[[1]]),
      pref = as.character(row$pref[[1]]),
      current_ma4 = ifelse(is.finite(row$current_ma4[[1]]), as.numeric(row$current_ma4[[1]]), NA_real_),
      current_value = ifelse(is.finite(row$current_value[[1]]), as.numeric(row$current_value[[1]]), NA_real_),
      seasonal_mean = ifelse(is.finite(row$seasonal_mean[[1]]), as.numeric(row$seasonal_mean[[1]]), NA_real_),
      seasonal_zscore = ifelse(is.finite(row$seasonal_zscore[[1]]), as.numeric(row$seasonal_zscore[[1]]), NA_real_),
      importance_score = ifelse(is.finite(row$importance_score[[1]]), as.numeric(row$importance_score[[1]]), NA_real_)
    )
  })
}

as_candidate_list <- function(df) {
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(list())
  lapply(seq_len(nrow(df)), function(i) {
    row <- df[i, ]
    list(
      category = as.character(row$category[[1]]),
      pref = as.character(row$pref[[1]]),
      importance_score = ifelse(is.finite(row$importance_score[[1]]), as.numeric(row$importance_score[[1]]), NA_real_),
      flags = unname(as.list(unlist(row$flags[[1]])))
    )
  })
}

as_top_news <- function(df) {
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)
  row <- df[1, ]
  list(
    category = as.character(row$category[[1]]),
    pref = as.character(row$pref[[1]]),
    importance_score = ifelse(is.finite(row$importance_score[[1]]), as.numeric(row$importance_score[[1]]), NA_real_),
    flags = unname(as.list(unlist(row$flags[[1]])))
  )
}

buildSummary <- function(digest) {
  lead_cat <- digest$lead$category
  top_news <- digest$top_news
  geo_context <- digest$geo_context
  anomalies_df <- digest$anomalies_df
  lead_anomalies <- if (!is.na(lead_cat)) anomalies_df %>% filter(category == lead_cat) else anomalies_df %>% slice(0)
  top_pref_df <- digest$top_pref_df
  rising_df <- digest$rising_df
  top_pref_alert <- top_pref_df %>% filter(is.finite(ratio_alert), ratio_alert >= 1)

  s1 <- if (nrow(top_news) > 0) {
    t_cat <- as.character(top_news$category[[1]])
    t_pref <- as.character(top_news$pref[[1]])
    t_flags <- unlist(top_news$flags[[1]])
    if ("alert" %in% t_flags) {
      sprintf("%sは%sで警報水準を超えています。", t_cat, t_pref)
    } else if ("anomaly" %in% t_flags) {
      sprintf("%sは%sで例年の季節水準を大きく上回っています。", t_cat, t_pref)
    } else if ("rising" %in% t_flags) {
      sprintf("%sは%sで増加が目立っています。", t_cat, t_pref)
    } else if (!is.na(lead_cat)) {
      sprintf("全国では%sが引き続き高水準で推移しています。", lead_cat)
    } else {
      "全国では明確な主題となる感染症は確認されませんでした。"
    }
  } else if (!is.na(lead_cat)) {
    sprintf("全国では%sが引き続き高水準で推移しています。", lead_cat)
  } else {
    "全国では明確な主題となる感染症は確認されませんでした。"
  }

  s2 <- if (!is.null(geo_context$sentence) && nzchar(geo_context$sentence)) {
    geo_context$sentence
  } else if (nrow(top_pref_alert) > 0) {
    pref_names <- paste(top_pref_alert$pref, collapse = "、")
    sprintf("%sでは警報基準を上回っています。", pref_names)
  } else if (nrow(top_pref_df) > 0) {
    pref_names <- paste(top_pref_df$pref, collapse = "、")
    sprintf("%sでは患者数が高水準です。", pref_names)
  } else {
    "警報継続が目立つ地域は限定的です。"
  }

  s3 <- if (nrow(anomalies_df) > 0) {
    a_cat <- as.character(anomalies_df$category[[1]])
    a_pref <- paste(unique(head((anomalies_df %>% filter(category == a_cat))$pref, 3)), collapse = "や")
    sprintf("一方、%sは%sで例年の数倍の水準です。", a_cat, a_pref)
  } else if (nrow(rising_df) > 0) {
    r <- paste(unique(head(rising_df$pref, 2)), collapse = "・")
    sprintf("%sで急増傾向がみられます。", r)
  } else {
    "季節逸脱や急増は限定的です。"
  }
  paste(c(s1, s2, s3), collapse = " ")
}

buildHeadline <- function(digest) {
  top_news <- digest$top_news
  if (nrow(top_news) > 0) {
    t_cat <- as.character(top_news$category[[1]])
    t_pref <- as.character(top_news$pref[[1]])
    t_flags <- unlist(top_news$flags[[1]])
    if ("anomaly" %in% t_flags) return(sprintf("%s、%sで例年の数倍", t_cat, t_pref))
    if ("alert" %in% t_flags) return(sprintf("%s、警報水準超え", t_cat))
    if ("rising" %in% t_flags) return(sprintf("%s、%sで増加が目立つ", t_cat, t_pref))
  }

  lead_cat <- digest$lead$category
  nationwide_ratio_alert <- digest$lead$nationwide_ratio_alert
  anomalies_df <- digest$anomalies_df
  top_pref_df <- digest$top_pref_df
  anomaly_lead <- nrow(anomalies_df) > 0 && !is.na(lead_cat) && as.character(anomalies_df$category[[1]]) == lead_cat
  if (is.na(lead_cat)) return("今週は全国で顕著な主題なし")
  if (anomaly_lead) {
    a <- anomalies_df %>% slice(1)
    return(sprintf("%s、%sで例年の数倍", lead_cat, as.character(a$pref[[1]])))
  }
  if (is.finite(nationwide_ratio_alert) && nationwide_ratio_alert < 1) {
    if (nrow(top_pref_df) > 0) {
      pref_text <- paste(unique(head(top_pref_df$pref, 2)), collapse = "・")
      return(sprintf("%s、%sなどで患者数が高水準", lead_cat, pref_text))
    }
    return(sprintf("%s、都道府県で患者数が高水準", lead_cat))
  }
  if (nrow(top_pref_df) > 0) {
    pref_text <- paste(unique(head(top_pref_df$pref, 2)), collapse = "・")
    return(sprintf("%sで警報水準が目立つ、%sに注目", lead_cat, pref_text))
  }
  sprintf("%sの動向に注目", lead_cat)
}

buildGeneratedHeadline <- function(alert_df, rising_df) {
  if (nrow(alert_df) > 0) {
    top       <- alert_df[1, ]
    cat_name  <- as.character(top$category[[1]])
    ratio     <- as.numeric(top$ratio_alert[[1]])
    count     <- as.integer(top$pref_alert_count[[1]])
    all_prefs <- unlist(top$top_prefs[[1]])
    if (is.finite(ratio) && ratio >= 1) {
      return(sprintf("%s、警報基準値の%.2f倍の患者数", cat_name, ratio))
    } else {
      pref_text <- formatPrefText(all_prefs, count)
      return(sprintf("%s、%s警報水準", cat_name, pref_text))
    }
  }
  if (nrow(rising_df) > 0) {
    top <- rising_df[1, ]
    cat_name <- as.character(top$category[[1]])
    pct      <- round(as.numeric(top$growth1Rate[[1]]) * 100)
    return(sprintf("%s、全国で前週比+%d%%の急増", cat_name, pct))
  }
  "今週は警報水準・急増ともに該当なし"
}

buildGeneratedSummary <- function(alert_df, rising_df) {
  parts <- character(0)
  if (nrow(alert_df) > 0) {
    top       <- alert_df[1, ]
    cat_name  <- as.character(top$category[[1]])
    count     <- as.integer(top$pref_alert_count[[1]])
    all_prefs <- unlist(top$top_prefs[[1]])
    pref_text <- formatPrefText(all_prefs, count)
    ratio     <- as.numeric(top$ratio_alert[[1]])
    nationwide_word <- if (is.finite(ratio) && ratio >= 1) "でも" else "では"
    parts <- c(parts, sprintf("%sは%s警報基準値を超えています（全国平均%s基準値の%.2f倍）。", cat_name, pref_text, nationwide_word, ratio))
  }
  if (nrow(rising_df) > 0 && nrow(alert_df) == 0) {
    top      <- rising_df[1, ]
    cat_name <- as.character(top$category[[1]])
    pct      <- round(as.numeric(top$growth1Rate[[1]]) * 100)
    parts <- c(parts, sprintf("%sは全国で前週比+%d%%の急増がみられます。", cat_name, pct))
  }
  if (length(parts) == 0) return("今週は警報水準・急増ともに目立った動向はありません。")
  paste(parts, collapse = " ")
}

buildAlertBullets <- function(rows, in_alert_now) {
  alert_prefs <- in_alert_now %>%
    filter(in_alert_level == TRUE, pref != "全国") %>%
    left_join(rows %>% select(category, pref, current_ma4), by = c("category", "pref")) %>%
    filter(is.finite(current_ma4), current_ma4 >= MIN_CURRENT_MA4) %>%
    arrange(category, desc(current_ma4))
  if (nrow(alert_prefs) == 0) return(list())
  alert_diseases <- unique(as.character(alert_prefs$category))
  lapply(alert_diseases, function(cat) {
    prefs_in_alert <- alert_prefs %>% filter(category == cat)
    n_total <- nrow(prefs_in_alert)
    top3 <- head(as.character(prefs_in_alert$pref), 3)
    if (n_total <= 3) {
      sprintf("%s：%sで患者数が警報レベル", cat, paste(top3, collapse = "、"))
    } else {
      sprintf("%s：%sなど%d都道府県で患者数が警報レベル", cat, paste(top3, collapse = "、"), n_total)
    }
  })
}

buildAnomalyBullets <- function(rows, alert_diseases) {
  nationwide_anomalies <- rows %>%
    filter(pref == "全国", is.finite(anomaly_z), anomaly_z >= 3,
           is.finite(current_ma4), current_ma4 >= MIN_CURRENT_MA4,
           is.finite(anomaly_ratio), anomaly_ratio > 1,
           !category %in% alert_diseases) %>%
    arrange(desc(anomaly_z))
  if (nrow(nationwide_anomalies) == 0) return(list())
  lapply(seq_len(nrow(nationwide_anomalies)), function(i) {
    row <- nationwide_anomalies[i, ]
    cat <- as.character(row$category[[1]])
    pct <- round((as.numeric(row$anomaly_ratio[[1]]) - 1) * 100)
    top_prefs <- rows %>%
      filter(category == cat, pref != "全国",
             is.finite(current_ma4), current_ma4 >= MIN_CURRENT_MA4) %>%
      arrange(desc(current_ma4)) %>%
      slice_head(n = 3) %>%
      pull(pref) %>%
      as.character()
    if (length(top_prefs) >= 1) {
      sprintf("%s：全国の患者数が平年比+%d%%で、とくに%sで多い", cat, pct, paste(top_prefs, collapse = "、"))
    } else {
      sprintf("%s：全国の患者数が平年比+%d%%", cat, pct)
    }
  })
}

buildGeneratedText <- function(digest, top_pref_df, rising_df, alert_df, rows, in_alert_now) {
  alert_cats     <- if (nrow(alert_df) > 0) as.character(alert_df$category) else character(0)
  rising_df_text <- rising_df %>% filter(!category %in% alert_cats)
  headline_text  <- buildGeneratedHeadline(alert_df, rising_df_text)
  summary_text   <- buildGeneratedSummary(alert_df, rising_df_text)
  alert_diseases  <- unique(as.character(
    in_alert_now %>% filter(in_alert_level == TRUE, pref != "全国") %>% pull(category)
  ))
  alert_bullets   <- buildAlertBullets(rows, in_alert_now)
  anomaly_bullets <- buildAnomalyBullets(rows, alert_diseases)
  bullets <- c(alert_bullets, anomaly_bullets)
  list(
    headline = headline_text,
    summary  = summary_text,
    bullets  = bullets
  )
}

# 週次系列（category + pref ごと）
weekly_series <- by_week %>%
  arrange(pref, category, year_week) %>%
  group_by(pref, category) %>%
  summarise(
    ma4_series = list(ma4),
    weekly_value_series = list(weekly_value),
    year_series = list(yr),
    week_series = list(wk),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

news_base <- ranking %>%
  left_join(weekly_series, by = c("pref", "category")) %>%
  mutate(
    is_major = is_major_category(category),
    persistenceWindow = PERSISTENCE_WINDOW,
    recent4_avg = map_dbl(ma4_series, ~ if (length(.x) >= 4) mean(tail(.x, 4), na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_),
    previous4_avg = map_dbl(ma4_series, ~ if (length(.x) >= 8) mean(tail(head(.x, length(.x) - 4), 4), na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_),
    growth4Rate = if_else(
      is.finite(previous4_avg) & previous4_avg >= MIN_AVG_FOR_GROWTH & is.finite(recent4_avg),
      (recent4_avg - previous4_avg) / previous4_avg,
      NA_real_
    ),
    growth4Rate = if_else(is.finite(growth4Rate), pmax(pmin(growth4Rate, 10), -1), NA_real_),
    current_value = map_dbl(weekly_value_series, ~ if (length(.x) >= 1) dplyr::last(.x) else NA_real_),
    previous_value = map_dbl(weekly_value_series, ~ if (length(.x) >= 2) dplyr::nth(.x, length(.x) - 1) else NA_real_),
    growth1Rate = if_else(
      is.finite(previous_value) & previous_value >= MIN_CURRENT_MA4 & is.finite(current_value) & current_value >= MIN_CURRENT_MA4,
      (current_value - previous_value) / previous_value,
      NA_real_
    ),
    growth1Diff = if_else(
      is.finite(current_value) & is.finite(previous_value),
      current_value - previous_value,
      NA_real_
    ),
    weeksOverAlert = map2_int(ma4_series, alert_start, ~ {
      if (!is.finite(.y) || length(.x) == 0) return(NA_integer_)
      sum(tail(.x, PERSISTENCE_WINDOW) > .y, na.rm = TRUE)
    }),
    persistenceRate = if_else(is.finite(weeksOverAlert), weeksOverAlert / persistenceWindow, NA_real_),
    current_ma4 = safe_num(current_ma4, 4),
    current_value = safe_num(current_value, 4),
    previous_value = safe_num(previous_value, 4),
    ratio_alert = safe_num(ratio_alert, 4),
    ratio_heinen = safe_num(ratio_heinen, 4),
    growth1Rate = safe_num(growth1Rate, 4),
    growth1Diff = safe_num(growth1Diff, 4),
    growth4Rate = safe_num(growth4Rate, 4),
    persistenceRate = safe_num(persistenceRate, 4),
    recent4_avg = safe_num(recent4_avg, 4),
    previous4_avg = safe_num(previous4_avg, 4)
  ) %>%
  computeSeasonalBaseline() %>%
  mutate(
    anomaly_z = mapply(
      function(current_value, seasonal_mean, seasonal_std) {
        computeSeasonalZscore(list(
          current_value = current_value,
          seasonal_mean = seasonal_mean,
          seasonal_std = seasonal_std
        ))
      },
      current_value, seasonal_mean, seasonal_std
    ),
    anomaly_ratio = if_else(
      is.finite(seasonal_mean) & seasonal_mean >= MIN_CURRENT_MA4,
      current_value / seasonal_mean,
      NA_real_
    ),
    anomaly_diff = if_else(
      is.finite(seasonal_mean),
      current_value - seasonal_mean,
      NA_real_
    ),
    seasonal_zscore = anomaly_z
  ) %>%
  select(
    category, pref, year_week, reference_date, is_major,
    current_ma4, current_value, previous_value, ratio_alert, ratio_heinen,
    recent4_avg, previous4_avg,
    growth1Rate, growth1Diff, growth4Rate, weeksOverAlert, persistenceRate, persistenceWindow,
    ma4_series, weekly_value_series, year_series, week_series,
    seasonal_mean, seasonal_std, seasonal_zscore, anomaly_z, anomaly_ratio, anomaly_diff
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(category), !is.na(pref))

# ---- ranking.csv に ratio_wow（前週比）を付与して書き出す ----
ranking_wow <- news_base %>%
  mutate(ratio_wow = if_else(
    is.finite(previous_value) & previous_value > 0 & is.finite(current_value),
    round(current_value / previous_value, 4),
    NA_real_
  )) %>%
  select(category, pref, ratio_wow)

ranking <- ranking %>%
  left_join(ranking_wow, by = c("category", "pref")) %>%
  select(category, pref, year_week, reference_date, current_ma4, baseline_ma4, ratio_heinen, alert_start, ratio_alert, ratio_wow)

write_excel_csv(ranking, "docs/results/ranking.csv")
message("ランキング出力: docs/results/ranking.csv")

alertPrefCountByDisease <- computeAlertPrefCounts(news_base)
anomalies_df <- detectAnomalies(news_base)

lead_pick <- selectLead(news_base)
lead_row <- lead_pick$row
lead_category <- if (nrow(lead_row) > 0) as.character(lead_row$category[[1]]) else NA_character_

lead_bundle <- integrateAnomalyIntoLead(list(
  lead = list(
    category = lead_category,
    nationwide_ratio_alert = if (nrow(lead_row) > 0 && is.finite(lead_row$ratio_alert[[1]])) as.numeric(lead_row$ratio_alert[[1]]) else NA_real_,
    nationwide_current_ma4 = if (nrow(lead_row) > 0 && is.finite(lead_row$current_ma4[[1]])) as.numeric(lead_row$current_ma4[[1]]) else NA_real_,
    reason = lead_pick$reason
  ),
  anomalies_df = anomalies_df,
  rows = news_base,
  lead_row = lead_row,
  lead_category = lead_category
))

lead_row <- lead_bundle$lead_row
lead_category <- lead_bundle$lead_category

top_pref_df <- selectTopPrefectures(
  news_base,
  lead_row,
  anomalies_df = anomalies_df,
  prefer_anomaly_prefs = isTRUE(grepl("^A: 季節パターン逸脱", lead_bundle$lead$reason))
)
alert_df <- selectAlerts(news_base)
rising_df <- selectRising(news_base)
improving_df <- selectImproving(news_base)

top_pref_df <- attachImportanceScore(top_pref_df)
rising_df <- attachImportanceScore(rising_df)
alert_df <- attachImportanceScore(alert_df)
improving_df <- attachImportanceScore(improving_df)
anomalies_df <- attachImportanceScore(anomalies_df)

news_candidates_df <- buildNewsCandidates(list(
  anomalies_df = anomalies_df,
  rising_df = rising_df,
  alert_df = alert_df
))
top_news_df <- pickTopNews(news_candidates_df)
geo_context <- buildGeoContext(list(
  top_news = top_news_df,
  top_pref_df = top_pref_df,
  rising_df = rising_df,
  alert_df = alert_df
))
lead_anomaly_df <- anomalies_df %>% filter(category == lead_category)
lead_importance_score <- if (nrow(lead_anomaly_df) > 0) {
  as.numeric(lead_anomaly_df$importance_score[[1]])
} else if (nrow(lead_row) > 0) {
  as.numeric(computeImportanceScore(lead_row[1, ]))
} else {
  NA_real_
}

generated_text <- buildGeneratedText(list(
  lead = lead_bundle$lead,
  anomalies_df = anomalies_df,
  top_news = top_news_df,
  geo_context = geo_context
), top_pref_df, rising_df, alert_df, rows = news_base, in_alert_now = in_alert_now)

lead_reason <- if (!is.null(lead_bundle$lead$reason)) {
  lead_bundle$lead$reason
} else if (nrow(lead_row) > 0) {
  sprintf("%s（全国 ratio_alert=%s）", lead_pick$reason, fmt_num(lead_row$ratio_alert[[1]]))
} else {
  "該当データなし"
}

news_digest <- list(
  week = as.character(reference_date),
  lead = list(
    category = ifelse(is.na(lead_category), NA_character_, lead_category),
    nationwide_ratio_alert = lead_bundle$lead$nationwide_ratio_alert,
    nationwide_current_ma4 = lead_bundle$lead$nationwide_current_ma4,
    reason = lead_reason,
    importance_score = lead_importance_score
  ),
  top_prefectures = as_item_list(top_pref_df, 3),
  rising = as_item_list(rising_df, 3),
  alerts = as_item_list(alert_df, 3),
  improving = as_item_list(improving_df, 3),
  anomalies = as_anomaly_list(anomalies_df, 3),
  news_candidates = as_candidate_list(news_candidates_df),
  top_news = as_top_news(top_news_df),
  spread_type = geo_context$spread_type,
  affected_blocks = unname(as.list(geo_context$affected_blocks)),
  generated_text = generated_text
)

writeLines(toJSON(news_digest, auto_unbox = TRUE, pretty = TRUE, na = "null"), "docs/results/news_digest.json")
message("ニュースJSON出力: docs/results/news_digest.json")

make_report_lines <- function(df, tag) {
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return("- 該当データなし")
  lines <- df %>% slice_head(n = 3) %>% mutate(
    line = case_when(
      tag == "high" ~ sprintf("- %s（%s）: 定点あたり患者数 %s", category, pref, fmt_num(current_ma4)),
      tag == "rising" ~ sprintf("- %s（%s）: 前週比増加率 %s / 定点あたり患者数 %s", category, pref, fmt_num(growth1Rate), fmt_num(current_value)),
      tag == "persistent" ~ sprintf("- %s（%s）: 継続週 %d/%d / 警報基準比 %s倍", category, pref, as.integer(weeksOverAlert), as.integer(persistenceWindow), fmt_num(ratio_alert)),
      tag == "improving" ~ sprintf("- %s（%s）: 前週比増加率 %s / 定点あたり患者数 %s", category, pref, fmt_num(growth1Rate), fmt_num(current_value)),
      TRUE ~ sprintf("- %s（%s）", category, pref)
    )
  ) %>% pull(line)
  lines
}

make_anomaly_lines <- function(df) {
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return("- 該当データなし")
  df %>%
    slice_head(n = 3) %>%
    mutate(
      line = sprintf(
        "- %s（%s）: 季節平均 %s → 現在 %s / seasonal_zscore %s",
        category, pref, fmt_num(seasonal_mean), fmt_num(current_value), fmt_num(seasonal_zscore)
      )
    ) %>%
    pull(line)
}

weekly_lines <- c(
  sprintf("# %s 時点の感染症動向", as.character(reference_date)),
  "",
  "## 概況",
  generated_text$summary,
  "",
  buildTopNewsSection(list(
    top_news = top_news_df,
    news_candidates = news_candidates_df
  )),
  "",
  "## 主な発生地域",
  make_report_lines(top_pref_df %>% mutate(category = ifelse(is.na(lead_category), category, lead_category)), "high"),
  "",
  "## 地域分布",
  geo_context$sentence,
  "",
  "## 上昇が目立つ感染症",
  make_report_lines(rising_df, "rising"),
  "",
  "## 警報水準の感染症",
  make_report_lines(alert_df, "alert"),
  "",
  "## 改善がみられる感染症",
  make_report_lines(improving_df, "improving"),
  "",
  "## 季節パターンからの逸脱",
  make_anomaly_lines(anomalies_df),
  "",
  "## 注記",
  "自動生成レポート"
)
writeLines(weekly_lines, "docs/results/weekly_report.md")
message("週報Markdown出力: docs/results/weekly_report.md")

```
